title: Sewing management system
abstract: A sewing management system includes: a plurality of sewing machines that perform pattern sewing with a current pattern, which is a set sewing pattern; and a management device that acquires current pattern information indicating information on the current pattern of the sewing machine, and determines whether the current pattern matches a planned sewing pattern.
claims: 1. A sewing management system comprising: a plurality of sewing machines configured to perform pattern sewing with a current pattern, which is a set sewing pattern; and a management device configured to acquire current pattern information indicating information on the current pattern of each sewing machine of the plurality of sewing machines, and configured to determine whether the current pattern matches a planned sewing pattern, wherein when it is determined that the current pattern of a sewing machine of the plurality of sewing machines is different from the planned sewing pattern, the management device transmits, to the sewing machine of the plurality of sewing machines, a request based on the current pattern of the sewing machine being different from the planned sewing pattern, the sewing machine of the plurality of sewing machines includes a display device that displays predetermined display data, and the sewing machine of the plurality of sewing machines displays a request message when the request is acquired.
